title: Saint-Étienne, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Saint-Étienne, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Saint-Étienne is a city in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes with a population of 172,000. A former industrial powerhouse transformed into a UNESCO City of Design, with a rich mining heritage and creative revival.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
